nodes.name: 长尾鹦鹉
nodes.summary: 长尾鹦鹉（Long-tailed parakeet，学名 Psittacula longicauda），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，常见栖息地包括沼泽，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The long-tailed parakeet is able to live in a wide variety of habitats such as in swamp forests, lowland evergreen forest, oil palm plantations, coconut plantations, gardens, public parks, and is a frequent visitor to agricultural areas (especially those who yield tropical fruits and seeds)

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Much of the long-tailed parakeet's natural habitat is threatened by deforestation and illegal logging
